---
name: Pull Request
about: Describe your changes
---

## Summary
Brief description of what this PR does.

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Code follows the existing style
- [ ] README / CHANGELOG updated if needed
